title: Automatic Identification System (AIS)
short description: Automatic Identification System (AIS) is used by ships to broadcast position and vessel information.
description: **Automatic Identification System (AIS)** is used by ships to broadcast position and vessel information. Uses 9.6 kbps [GMSK](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gaussian_minimum-shift_keying#Gaussian_minimum-shift_keying) modulation.
